message:
fix: update test assertions, reduce flakiness, and normalize resource dedup

Five independent minor fixes:

1. extension_preflight: update three test assertions from "2.0.0" to
   "2.1.0" to match the current SECURITY_RULEBOOK_VERSION constant.

2. compaction_worker: replace yield_now() with 50ms timed sleep in
   three test sites. Bare yield_now() does not reliably allow background
   task state transitions (abort flag, timeout, result delivery) to
   become visible before assertions, causing intermittent failures.

3. resources: use canonical_identity_path() instead of raw
   to_string_lossy() as the dedup key in dedupe_paths(), so equivalent
   paths with different string representations (e.g. containing ../
   segments or trailing slashes) are properly deduplicated.

4. agent.rs: update test session provider/model from openai/gpt-4o to
   anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5.

5. interactive/agent.rs: replace openai/gpt-4o-mini test fixture with
   synthetic continue-probe/continue-probe-model to avoid
   provider-specific side effects. Add diagnostic logging for AgentDone
   errors, AgentError events, and zero-call status in the
   submit_message integration test for easier failure diagnosis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
